claim: 95% of GenAI pilots fail to reach production; the gap is feedback integration, not demos or prompt engineering
actionable: Plan for continuous improvement loops from inception; don't treat production as final; budget for reinforcement learning/feedback cycles.
source_title: Lessons from Trillion Token Deployments at Fortune 500s

claim: Reinforcement learning outperforms instruction fine-tuning for post-training; RL unlocks smaller models at production scale
actionable: For production deployments, invest in RL pipelines over SFT; smaller RL-tuned models often beat larger SFT models on quality and cost.
source_title: Lessons from Trillion Token Deployments at Fortune 500s

claim: Smaller models trained with RL are faster (sub-500ms latency for speech agents) and cheaper at scale than frontier models
actionable: For latency-sensitive agents (speech, real-time), use 7B-13B RL-tuned models instead of 100B+ frontier models; measure end-to-end latency.
source_title: Lessons from Trillion Token Deployments at Fortune 500s

claim: Synthetic data for agent training is generated as byproduct of environment/reward during RL, not collected pre-training
actionable: For agent training, build executable environments first, define rewards, then generate synthetic trajectories via RL exploration.
source_title: Lessons from Trillion Token Deployments at Fortune 500s

claim: LLM judges replace expensive annotation campaigns; define rubrics instead of annotating examples (hours not weeks)
actionable: Use LLM judges with clear rubrics/system prompts for reward signals; avoid traditional annotation; update judge prompts iteratively.
source_title: Lessons from Trillion Token Deployments at Fortune 500s

claim: Agents increase token consumption 10x over simpler tasks, making tokenomics critical; smaller RL-tuned models solve this
actionable: For agent workloads, calculate token budgets per task; if millions of dollars, pursue RL-tuning of smaller models to reduce costs.
source_title: Lessons from Trillion Token Deployments at Fortune 500s
